name: Pickled Three-Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Green or yellow beans (cut and blanched)
recipeInstructions:
Yield: About 5 to 6 half-pints
1. Wash and snap off ends of fresh beans. Cut or snap into 1- to 2-inch pieces. Blanch for 3 minutes, then cool immediately.
2. Rinse kidney beans with tap water and drain again.
3. Prepare and measure all other vegetables.
4. Combine vinegar, lemon juice, sugar, and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, remove from heat, add oil and salt, and mix well.
5. Add beans, onions, celery, and green peppers to the solution. Bring to a simmer.
6. Marinate for 12 to 14 hours in the refrigerator.
7. Fill clean jars with solids.
8. Add hot liquid, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
9. Adjust lids and process according to the recommendations in Table 1.
Table 1. Recommended processing time for Pickled Three-Bean Salad in a boiling water canner.
Style of Pack: Hot
Jar Size: Half-pints or Pints
Process Time at Altitudes of:
0 - 1,000 ft: 15 minutes
1,001 - 6,000 ft: 20 minutes
Above 6,000 ft: 25 minutes
